# ciphertrust_cte_signature_sets (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# Terraform Configuration for CipherTrust Provider

# The provider is configured to connect to the CipherTrust appliance and fetch details
# about the CTE SignatureSets.

terraform {
  # Define the required providers for the configuration
  required_providers {
    # CipherTrust provider for managing CipherTrust resources
    ciphertrust = {
      # The source of the provider
      source = "ThalesGroup/CipherTrust"
      # Version of the provider to use
      version = "1.0.0-pre3"
    }
  }
}

# Configure the CipherTrust provider for authentication
provider "ciphertrust" {
	# The address of the CipherTrust appliance (replace with the actual address)
  address = "https://10.10.10.10"

  # Username for authenticating with the CipherTrust appliance
  username = "admin"

  # Password for authenticating with the CipherTrust appliance
  password = "ChangeMe101!"
}

# Data source for retrieving Signature Sets
data "ciphertrust_cte_signarure_sets" "example" {
}

output "signature_sets" {
  # Outputs Signature Sets retrieved from the data source
  value = "${data.ciphertrust_cte_signature_sets.example.signature_sets}"
}
```
